title: Final Whistle: Spain vs Argentina
description: Lead Spain through a 150-second 3D arcade football final against Argentina with passing, tackles, charged shots, and golden-goal drama.

prompt.objective: Build a fast arcade football final with assisted team play and golden goal.

mintAssets.brief: Stadium, pitch, goals, ball, props, players, staff, trophy, and confetti.
Curated football, goalkeeper, cheer, and sideline motions for the cast.
Crowd, whistle, kick, save, goal, and victory sounds.

experience: Move, sprint, pass, tackle, switch players, and charge shots.
Play 150 seconds with restarts, stamina, AI, and golden goal.
prompt.visualDirection: Candy-gloss miniature stadium, night lighting, and an arcade HUD.

thumbnail.alt: Spain celebrates a 2-1 championship victory in a packed open-top stadium.

social.title: Final Whistle: Spain vs Argentina
social.description: Lead Spain through a fast arcade football final against Argentina.

image.alt: Spain celebrates a 2-1 championship victory in a packed open-top stadium.
